from openpyxl import Workbook
from openpyxl.styles import Font, Alignment, Border, Side, PatternFill
from openpyxl.utils import get_column_letter

def build_template(ws):
    ws.title = "売上実績表"

    # Column widths (A=1 through T=20)
    col_widths = {
        1: 3,   # spacer
        2: 6,   # 月別
        3: 8,   # 区分
        4: 12,  # 前々年実績
        5: 5,   # %
        6: 12,  # 前年実績
        7: 5,   # %
        8: 12,  # 販売目標/予算目標
        9: 5,   # %
        10: 12, # 大分類・課別・参考
        11: 5,  # %
        12: 12, # 前年度累計
        13: 5,  # %
        14: 12, # 本年度累計
        15: 5,  # %
        16: 12, # 目標累計
        17: 5,  # %
        18: 3,  # spacer
    }
    for col, width in col_widths.items():
        ws.column_dimensions[get_column_letter(col)].width = width

    num_rows = 62
    num_cols = 18

    # Row heights
    for r in range(1, num_rows + 1):
        ws.row_dimensions[r].height = 15

    ws.row_dimensions[1].height = 18
    ws.row_dimensions[2].height = 18
    ws.row_dimensions[3].height = 18

    # 1. Apply thin border to every cell
    thin = Side(style='thin')
    border = Border(top=thin, bottom=thin, left=thin, right=thin)
    for row in ws.iter_rows(min_row=1, max_row=num_rows, min_col=1, max_col=num_cols):
        for cell in row:
            cell.border = border

    # 2. Fills
    header_fill = PatternFill(fill_type='solid', fgColor='C0C0C0')
    light_fill = PatternFill(fill_type='solid', fgColor='E0E0E0')

    header_cells = [
        (1,2),(1,3),(1,4),(1,5),(1,6),(1,7),(1,8),(1,9),(1,10),(1,11),(1,12),(1,13),(1,14),(1,15),(1,16),(1,17),
        (2,2),(2,3),(2,4),(2,5),(2,6),(2,7),(2,8),(2,9),(2,10),(2,11),(2,12),(2,13),(2,14),(2,15),(2,16),(2,17),
        (3,2),(3,3),(3,4),(3,5),(3,6),(3,7),(3,8),(3,9),(3,10),(3,11),(3,12),(3,13),(3,14),(3,15),(3,16),(3,17),
    ]
    for (r,c) in header_cells:
        ws.cell(row=r, column=c).fill = header_fill

    # Subtotal rows shading (上半期合計, 下半期合計, 期間合計, 年度合計)
    subtotal_rows = [16, 17, 40, 41, 54, 55, 60, 61, 62]
    for r in subtotal_rows:
        for c in range(2, 18):
            ws.cell(row=r, column=c).fill = light_fill

    # 3. Values, fonts, alignment
    bold = Font(bold=True)
    center = Alignment(horizontal='center', vertical='center')
    right = Alignment(horizontal='right', vertical='center')

    # Title row
    ws.cell(row=1, column=2).value = "売上実績表"
    ws.cell(row=1, column=2).font = Font(bold=True, size=14)
    ws.cell(row=1, column=2).alignment = center

    # Header row 2 - main column headers
    headers_r2 = {
        2: "月別",
        3: "区分",
        4: "前々年実績",
        6: "前年実績",
        8: "販売目標\n予算目標",
        10: "大分類・課別・参考",
        12: "前年度累計",
        14: "本年度累計",
        16: "目標累計",
    }
    for c, v in headers_r2.items():
        ws.cell(row=2, column=c).value = v
        ws.cell(row=2, column=c).font = bold
        ws.cell(row=2, column=c).alignment = center

    # Header row 3 - % sub-headers
    pct_cols = [5, 7, 9, 11, 13, 15, 17]
    for c in pct_cols:
        ws.cell(row=3, column=c).value = "%"
        ws.cell(row=3, column=c).font = bold
        ws.cell(row=3, column=c).alignment = center

    # Month labels and row labels
    months = [
        (4, "4月"), (7, "5月"), (10, "6月"), (13, "7月"),
        (16, "8月"), (19, "9月"), (22, "上半期\n合計"),
        (25, "10月"), (28, "11月"), (31, "12月"),
        (34, "1月"), (37, "2月"), (40, "3月"),
        (43, "下半期\n合計"), (46, "期間\n合計"), (49, "年度\n合計"),
    ]

    row_labels = ["売上額", "前年比%", "粗利額", "粗利率%"]

    current_row = 4
    month_data = [
        "4月","5月","6月","7月","8月","9月","上半期\n合計",
        "10月","11月","12月","1月","2月","3月",
        "下半期\n合計","期間\n合計","年度\n合計"
    ]

    r = 4
    for month in month_data:
        ws.cell(row=r, column=2).value = month
        ws.cell(row=r, column=2).font = bold
        ws.cell(row=r, column=2).alignment = center
        for i, lbl in enumerate(row_labels):
            ws.cell(row=r+i, column=3).value = lbl
            ws.cell(row=r+i, column=3).alignment = center
        r += 4

    # Page setup
    ws.page_setup.paperSize = 9
    ws.page_setup.fitToPage = True
    ws.page_setup.fitToWidth = 1
    ws.page_setup.fitToHeight = 1
    ws.page_setup.orientation = "landscape"
    ws.page_margins.left = 0.5
    ws.page_margins.right = 0.5
    ws.page_margins.top = 0.5
    ws.page_margins.bottom = 0.5

    # 4. Merge cells - LAST
    ws.merge_cells('B1:Q1')  # Title
    ws.merge_cells('B2:B3')  # 月別
    ws.merge_cells('C2:C3')  # 区分
    ws.merge_cells('D2:E2')  # 前々年実績
    ws.merge_cells('F2:G2')  # 前年実績
    ws.merge_cells('H2:I2')  # 販売目標
    ws.merge_cells('J2:K2')  # 大分類
    ws.merge_cells('L2:M2')  # 前年度累計
    ws.merge_cells('N2:O2')  # 本年度累計
    ws.merge_cells('P2:Q2')  # 目標累計

    # Month merges (col B spans 4 rows each)
    r = 4
    for month in month_data:
        ws.merge_cells(start_row=r, start_column=2, end_row=r+3, end_column=2)
        r += 4
